ui/pages/architecture.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin tier-2 orchestrator delegating to ArchPrinciplesIndex/Detail + ArchitectureDecisionsIndex/Detail; redundant imports removed (check 9); clickable divs fixed (check 10)

ui/pages/feature.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin orchestrator delegating to FeatureListPanel + detail panel; redundant import removed (check 9); types and logic in useFeatureSpace()

ui/pages/inbox.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin orchestrator delegating to InboxListPanel + ReviewItemDetail; correct tier-2 pattern

ui/pages/index.vue.notes: All violations resolved; nextReleaseName from useDashboard; activeLaneCount and totalPending from useMockData; no more hardcoded strings

ui/pages/policy.vue.notes: All violations resolved; interfaces were already in usePolicy.ts (check 3 was stale); PolicyTopicDetail extracted for right panel (check 6)

ui/pages/product.vue.notes: All violations resolved; interfaces were already in useProduct.ts (check 3 was stale); ProductArtifactDetail extracted for right panel (check 6)

ui/pages/roadmap.vue.notes: All violations resolved; 90-line thin orchestrator delegating to RoadmapSummaryBar + RoadmapReleasesSection + IntentDetailPanel + SegmentedControl; accessibility fixed (check 10); standalone utility functions exported from useRoadmap.ts for Nuxt auto-import

ui/pages/setup.vue.notes: Template is 196 lines total but no single logical section exceeds 80 lines; accepted as borderline for a multi-section settings page; SetupItemDetail extracted for detail view

ui/pages/worktree/[id]/review/[reviewId].notes: Refactored: consolidated with lane review page; both now use useMockData().getReview() and auto-imported statusColor

ui/components/AppSidebar.vue.notes: All violations resolved; decomposed into SidebarNavLinks + SidebarLanesList; AppSidebar now ~65 lines (header + nav + lanes + bottom)

ui/components/SidebarNavLinks.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from AppSidebar; renders NavItems with currentPath + totalPending props

ui/components/SidebarLanesList.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from AppSidebar; renders lane list items with pending badges and stage button

ui/components/ArchitectureAdrDetail.vue.notes: All violations resolved; AdrSectionsList extracted for the sections loop; template now ~85 lines (check 1 resolved)

ui/components/AdrSectionsList.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; renders ADR sections with optional table; accepts sections: AdrSection[] prop

ui/components/ArchitectureDecisionsIndex.notes: All violations resolved; check 10 fixed: clickable tr replaced by button in title cell; template compacted to ~75 lines (check 1 resolved)

ui/components/ArchitecturePrincipleDetai.notes: All violations resolved; PrincipleRelatedAdrs extracted for the related decisions section; template now ~55 lines

ui/components/PrincipleRelatedAdrs.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; renders related ADR buttons with navigate emit; accepts relatedAdrKeys + adrs props

ui/components/ArchitecturePrinciplesInde.notes: Template ~79 lines (under limit); check 10 fixed: clickable div → <button type='button' w-full text-left>

ui/components/EmptyState.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 presenter — props in, slot out, no composable calls

ui/components/FeatureListPanel.vue.notes: All violations resolved; decomposed into FeatureSearchResults + FeatureGroupView + FeatureDetailPanel; check 10 fixed (buttons); now ~65 lines

ui/components/FeatureCard.vue.notes: New unified card presenter; used by FeatureSearchResults and FeatureGroupView; supports highlight, compact mode, conditional badge display; uses button (not div)

ui/components/FeatureDetailPanel.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from FeatureListPanel; uses FeatureProblemRefs + FeatureRelatedItems sub-components; ~70 lines

ui/components/FeatureProblemRefs.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; problem cross-reference cards with icon + name + description; accepts problems: string[] prop

ui/components/FeatureRelatedItems.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; related features list with navigate-style buttons; accepts related: EnrichedFeature[] prop

ui/components/FeatureSearchResults.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; search results list using FeatureCard with highlight; ~35 lines

ui/components/FeatureGroupView.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; group header + FeatureCard list with conditional badge display; ~45 lines

ui/components/InboxListPanel.vue.notes: All violations resolved; InboxGroupSection extracted for group+item rendering; InboxListPanel now ~65 lines

ui/components/InboxGroupSection.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; renders groups + items for a lane; collapsible group header + item rows with quick action buttons

ui/components/IntentDetailPanel.vue.notes: All violations resolved; IntentMetadata extracted for priority/lane/issue rows; template now ~75 lines

ui/components/IntentMetadata.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; renders intent priority, lane link, and GitHub issue metadata rows

ui/components/LaneCommitsTab.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 presenter — ~39-line template, typed props, no composable calls

ui/components/LaneDetail.vue.notes: All violations resolved; thin orchestrator delegating to LaneInboxTab + LaneWorkflowTab + LaneCommitsTab

ui/components/LaneInboxTab.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 presenter — ~77-line template, typed props, uses useExpandable() (UI-utility allowed in tier-3), statusColor auto-imported

ui/components/LaneWorkflowTab.vue.notes: All violations resolved; WorkflowStepRow extracted for step rendering; LaneWorkflowTab now ~45 lines

ui/components/WorkflowStepRow.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; renders a single workflow step with state icon, name, detail, duration, and unblock button

ui/components/NavItem.vue.notes: Refactored: removed useRoute(), now accepts isActive as a prop; default.vue computes and passes it

ui/components/PolicyTopicDetail.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from policy.vue; renders topic detail with sections (items list or text content)

ui/components/ProductArtifactDetail.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from product.vue; renders artifact detail with name, file, status, sections

ui/components/ReviewItemDetail.vue.notes: All violations resolved; ReviewRoundSelector + ReviewFeedbackCard + ReviewActionBar extracted; template now ~165 lines

ui/components/ReviewRoundSelector.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; round tab selector with status dot; accepts rounds, activeRound, currentStatus

ui/components/ReviewFeedbackCard.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; renders a past-round feedback card with status-aware colors (approved/changes-requested/rejected)

ui/components/ReviewActionBar.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter; comment textarea + Approve/Request changes/Reject buttons; uses defineModel for comment and commentError

ui/components/RoadmapReleasesSection.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from roadmap.vue; typed props/emits; release header uses <button>; intent rows use role=button + keyboard handlers (can't be <button> due to interactive children); releaseStatus/releaseStatusColor/meaningfulCount auto-imported from useRoadmap.ts

ui/components/RoadmapSummaryBar.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from roadmap.vue; typed props/emits; shipped/current/planned stats grid with progress bar; meaningfulCount auto-imported from useRoadmap.ts

ui/components/SegmentedControl.vue.notes: Removed export keyword from SegmentOption interface — now a local type; no external importers

ui/components/SetupItemDetail.vue.notes: New tier-3 presenter extracted from setup.vue; typed props/emits; covers all item types (plugin, command, skill, hook); typeIcon/typeColor auto-imported from useSetup.ts; import type { SetupItem } kept (types not auto-imported)

ui/components/TwoPanelLayout.vue.notes: Clean tier-3 structural layout — slot-based, no logic
